item.title: Playing with awesome physics projects!!
item.description: A look at fun physics projects that make science easy to explore and learn.

media:content.media:title: Playing with awesome physics projects!!
media:content.media:description: A look at fun physics projects that make science easy to explore and learn.

item.title: Why AC electricity doesn’t behave the way you think
item.description: In this video I talk about why AC currents usually hide a DC bias

media:content.media:title: Why AC electricity doesn’t behave the way you think
media:content.media:description: In this video I talk about why AC currents usually hide a DC bias

item.title: Testing Tesla’s wireless energy idea
item.description: A science experiment inspired by Nikola Tesla’s wireless energy idea

media:content.media:title: Testing Tesla’s wireless energy idea
media:content.media:description: A science experiment inspired by Nikola Tesla’s wireless energy idea

item.title: Don't make an ion trap at home
item.description: In show you how to make an ion trap using electrically charged particles and AC. This experiment used high voltage and is very dangerous. Do NOT try to replicate this. Any recreation you try is at your own risk.

media:content.media:title: Don't make an ion trap at home
media:content.media:description: In show you how to make an ion trap using electrically charged particles and AC. This experiment used high voltage and is very dangerous. Do NOT try to replicate this. Any recreation you try is at your own risk.

item.title: Hydraulic press experiment!
item.description: A simple hydraulic press experiment demonstrating pressure and physics in action.

media:content.media:title: Hydraulic press experiment!
media:content.media:description: A simple hydraulic press experiment demonstrating pressure and physics in action.

item.title: Can piranha solution dissolve diamond?
item.description: In this video I put a diamond in one of the most dangerous solutions called piranha solution. I show you how crazy this highly acidic/highly oxidizing liquid is. I put a sponge in it then I put in a hot dog. Then finally I test if the solution can actually dissolve a diamond!

media:content.media:title: Can piranha solution dissolve diamond?
media:content.media:description: In this video I put a diamond in one of the most dangerous solutions called piranha solution. I show you how crazy this highly acidic/highly oxidizing liquid is. I put a sponge in it then I put in a hot dog. Then finally I test if the solution can actually dissolve a diamond!

item.title: What happens to a diamond in lava?
item.description: A diamond is placed in lava to see how it reacts to extreme heat. A simple science demo about carbon, temperature, and change.

media:content.media:title: What happens to a diamond in lava?
media:content.media:description: A diamond is placed in lava to see how it reacts to extreme heat. A simple science demo about carbon, temperature, and change.

item.title: Seeing inside a self-starting siphon
item.description: This is how a siphon gets its power.

media:content.media:title: Seeing inside a self-starting siphon
media:content.media:description: This is how a siphon gets its power.

item.title: Can a drone fly in a vacuum chamber?
item.description: Testing whether a drone can fly in a vacuum chamber

media:content.media:title: Can a drone fly in a vacuum chamber?
media:content.media:description: Testing whether a drone can fly in a vacuum chamber

item.title: Turning 3D Balls Into 2D
item.description: A simple science demo exploring how 3D balls can be represented in 2D through stereographic geometry.

media:content.media:title: Turning 3D Balls Into 2D
media:content.media:description: A simple science demo exploring how 3D balls can be represented in 2D through stereographic geometry.
